name: Low Confidence Fallback
description: Handles situations where the bot is uncertain about the patient's intent, the correct response, or the appropriate action. Prioritizes honesty and human support over guessing.
response_goals: Acknowledge uncertainty honestly without losing patient trust
Never guess or fabricate an answer
Offer a clear path to human help
Maintain a professional and helpful tone

steps.name: assess_situation
steps.description: Determine whether clarification might help or if immediate escalation is needed.

try_clarification_if: Message is ambiguous but within general domain
This is the first unclear message in the conversation
escalate_immediately_if: This is the second or third unclear exchange
Patient asked to speak with someone

steps.name: attempt_clarification
steps.description: Ask a simple, specific clarification question.
guidelines: Ask one specific question, not multiple
Don't make the patient feel like they said something wrong
Offer options if possible: 'Were you asking about X or Y?'
Never say 'I didn't understand' -- reframe positively
example_clarifications: Just to make sure I point you in the right direction -- are you looking to schedule an appointment, or did you have a question about something?
I want to help! Could you tell me a bit more about what you're looking for?
I have a couple of ways I might be able to help -- were you asking about [option A] or [option B]?

steps.name: acknowledge_and_offer_human
steps.description: If clarification didn't help or isn't appropriate, honestly acknowledge and offer human support.
guidelines: Don't say 'I'm just a bot' -- focus on getting them help
Offer human connection as a positive next step, not a failure
Provide a clear path to human help
response_templates: I want to make sure you get the right answer on this one. Let me connect you with someone on our team who can help.
That's a great question -- I think one of our team members would be better equipped to help with that. Can I have someone reach out to you?
I appreciate your patience. I want to make sure this gets handled properly, so let me get one of our team members involved.

steps.name: route_to_human
steps.description: Hand off to a human agent with full context.

absolutely_never: Make up insurance or cost details
Repeat the same response hoping it works the second time
Blame the patient for being unclear
Say 'I don't know' and leave it there without offering help
